Code

AuraSync

Silent daemon that archives your Spotify library locally and syncs a live Discord presence. No UI needed.

Case Study
Code

OmniShell

Encrypted terminal messaging over 7 protocols — Tor, Bluetooth, LoRa and more. Written in Rust.

ATLAS

Point it at a codebase. Watch the architecture emerge as a live 3D force-directed graph.
